parameters.query:
SELECT 
  f.name AS feed_name,
  f.active AS feed_active,
  p.id AS post_id,
  p.title AS post_title,
  p.content AS post_content,
  p.author AS post_author,
  p.url AS post_url,
  p.published_at AS post_published_at
FROM s_substack.feeds_monitored f
LEFT JOIN s_substack.posts p ON p.feed_id = f.id AND p.published_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days'
WHERE f.active = TRUE
ORDER BY f.name, p.published_at DESC;
